name: Beef Patties Italian-Style
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Sliced cheese, provolone or Mozzarella or fontina
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions.
2. Meanwhile, shape ground beef into 4 oval patties about 1/2-inch thick.
3. In a large skillet, fry patties over medium heat until browned on both sides.
4. Sprinkle with salt and remove the patties to a serving platter.
5. Add onion to the drippings in the pan and cook until tender.
6. Add garlic, mushrooms, and peppers. Cook until they are tender crisp.
7. Drain off excess fat. Stir in oregano and spaghetti sauce into the vegetables and heat until boiling.
8. Simmer for 1 minute. Return the beef patties to the skillet.
9. Top each patty with a slice of cheese and heat through.
10. Place cooked spaghetti on plates. Using a pancake turner, transfer the patties and sauce over the spaghetti.
11. Garnish with fresh oregano if desired. SERVES 4.
